feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Insula structure is linked to autonomic cardiac dysregulation in depression
entry.content:
Authors: ASR Fermin, HL Chan, M Takamura, N Ichikawa... - Biological Psychiatry, 2026

Abstract: Abstract Background Major Depressive Disorder (MDD), characterized primarily by mood disturbances, is also accompanied by abnormal cardiovascular functioning. However, the neuroanatomical substrates underlying this cardiovascular dysfunction ...

Alert: Karl Friston (author alert)

entry.title: The unbearable hardness of deciding about magic
entry.content:
Authors: J Eisert, L Leone, S Oliviero

Journal: 2026

Abstract: Identifying the boundary between classical and quantum computation is a central challenge in quantum information. In multi-qubit systems, entanglement and magic are the key resources underlying genuinely quantum behaviour. While entanglement ...

Alert: Jens Eisert (author alert)

entry.title: Selection for growth drives the emergence of genetic heredity in protocells
entry.content:
Authors: R Nunes Palmeira, M Colnaghi, A Pomiankowski... - PLoS biology, 2026

Abstract: Most theoretical work on the origin of heredity has focused on how genetic information can be maintained without mutational degradation in the absence of error-proofing systems. A simple and parsimonious solution assumes the first gene ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

Alert: Nick Lane (author alert)

entry.title: The impact of sociocultural background and parental education on academic performance and time management in mathematics and introductory courses
entry.content:
Authors: AKF Loder, GM de Oliveira Wood - Acta Psychologica, 2026

Abstract: This study investigates the impact of various demographic factors—nationality, migration status, and parental education—on students' academic performance and timing of attempts in both mathematics and introduction courses at an Austrian ...

Alert: Guilherme M. de O. Wood (author alert)
